antipattern.symptom: PR template exists but PRs ignore it (sections left blank).

root-cause.source: Internal review of org PRs Q1 2026

antipattern.root-cause: No CI check enforces template completion.
antipattern.fix: Add CI step that fails when PR body's required sections are unfilled.

antipattern.symptom: Default branch allows force-push or 0 required reviewers.
antipattern.root-cause: Org admins bypass protection 'for emergencies' and forget to re-enable.
antipattern.fix: Add audit cron that diffs current protection vs. expected; alerts on drift.

antipattern.symptom: Metrics dashboard exists but no one looks; cycle time creeps up unnoticed.
antipattern.root-cause: Dashboard not linked to a review ritual.
antipattern.fix: Tie metrics review to a recurring 15-min team agenda item.
